gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 high review initially found non-string identity fields, mapping adapter_ids, and non-int segment spans; commit f2e9542 resolves all findings and reviewer approved with no remaining issues.
scope: EngineKVInjectionPlan validation, focused adapter tests, README governance text.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_adapters.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q => 133 passed; git diff --check => clean; poetry run pytest -q => 944 passed; poetry build => succeeded; poetry check && poetry install --dry-run => succeeded.
what_changed: Hardened EngineKVInjectionPlan construction for native vLLM/SGLang KV handoff plans.
why: Malformed public injection plans should fail before native block-manager reservation/copy calls.
